description: As a load and performance tester, my job is to find the peeks and performance failures in the clients' systems, and report them. I used AppLoader for more than 50 clients' projects, and the clients love the reports and graphs generated by the tool, as it helps them correct performance failures.
author: zaineb B.
pros: What I liked the most about AppLoader, is that it can test almost all types of applications (desktop, webservices, web applications...), you just need a human machine interface. I loved the reports generated by AppLoader and the easiness of launching parallel users at the same time. I also loved the instant reporting and the screenshots of the failures during the test. I enjoyed the easiness of using ScenarioBuilder to create the performance scenarios. The greatest thing about this software, and I am sure all AppLoader's users will answer the same, is the reactivity and quality of the support team. They are always available and reactive and very helpful in case of problems with the software.
cons: What I liked the least about it, is its price. AppLoader is very expensive when comparing it to other tools for performance and load testing in the market. Therefore, it cannot be used by small sized companies.

review_title: Great solution for automated app testing
description: AppLoader is a good software for organizations who wants to perform automated testing without spending too much time efforts. It offers no code development and performance testing to get the appropriate testing.
author: Jhanvi K.
pros: It's a great software for perform automatic testing without having knowledge of coding. The tool is very easy to use and provide best user interface.
cons: Generally speaking that i haven't feel any disadvantage of the tool.

description: It's good for low and med complex apps
author: eswarababu D.
pros: AppLoader assists users to create simple scenarios and begin testing their applications right away.
cons: can not enhance the scripts to require scalability

description: My work experience with app loader is good. Happy with service provided by apploader.
author: Bharat S.
pros: App loader is very easy to use and understand. It test all type of applications. It monitor the applications very well and create short script at the end. It also provide free trail to use.
cons: The cost is high but for one time. And should provide service for iOS and android applications. Otherwise it is good

description: positive. we have had some initial teething problems with the config but these are to be expected. your support team has been very helpful in resolving our issues but as mentioned above the time difference between Ireland and California has meant that the process has sometimes taken longer than we would have liked
author: Mark C.
pros: the ease of use. I've used other performance tools in the past which end up requiring more coding than the applications they are supposed to test... so the fact that scripts can be built from the GUI without the need to write code is a definite plus
cons: when we have needed support the response has been uniformly helpful and positive. the lack of a support line covering European working hours has delayed resolving issues a couple of times. Is theer no way that members of the support team in California could work staggered shifts to cover non US based clients
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: With AppLoader, it was possible to test and verify the performance of an application that needed to be tested. This enabled me to understand the expected performance requirements before putting them into an active environment.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: ease of use, all very intuitive. I had no problem.
cons: I have little use of the software, I have not gotten any bad experiences yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use performance testing tool
description: We used Apploader for testing applications using Critix. It worked without any problems.
author: Steve S.
pros: 1. Easy to use 2. Scripting was straight forward 3. Reports and metrics were very useful 4. Support was very good
cons: 1. Needed help from support to fix an image issue

review_title: Great Monitoring software. Able to automate the monitoring the software similar to having a bot
description: Improve SLA and provide a timely and real response to software problem
author: Vincent T.
pros: One of a kind monitoring software that able to emulate human interface and detect any abnormally in the software and send alert accordingly or create a history of performance from the human experience perspective
cons: A bit tedious to configure if monitoring steps are too complex. But I think it is the nature of the complexity software

review_title: AppLoader is the best tool for RemoteApp testing
author: Ravikukar G.
pros: Ease of scripting, Protocol independent, User friendly, ultimate performance monitoring and supports DevOps life cycle
cons: Not recommended for huge load due to infrastructure issues. Seeing issues with rUserManager during run time.

review_title: AppLoader is very intuitive load-testing solution
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I liked that you are able to easily choose images to automate processes. I also like how you can have the program create multiple users to run the tests.
cons: I did not like some aspects of the image detection. Sometimes there was a difference in shading when a cursor is over an icon and you needed to attach multiple images because of this.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: AppLoader is a good product that is easy to use, just has some limitations like most software does.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: AppLoader is fairly easy to use and the customer service is good.
cons: Was not able to use it for all our needs. Is a little limited in the capabilities that my company needed.
author_profession: Automated Test Engineer (Contract for Mammography Reporting Systems)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Helps to identify potential problem with ERP performance
author: Gennady D.
pros: Provides good analytics and helps to identify potential performance issues
cons: Requires set of additional hardware which is used from time to time

description: Really old application and could not figure out the communication protocol. App loader was used and worked out great
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It’s protocol independent . Great support team
cons: With a high user load, a lot of investment into the infrastructure to support testing
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: AppLoader is helping with our critical specific needs.
author: Praveen V.
pros: Ability to handle complex use cases without the need to handle programmatically capturing dynamic information from server side or manipulating extensive data sets to let scripts work.
cons: Maintenance cost of the scripts as we switch software versions frequently or switch environments has been a concern though in recent NRG software versions, this has been mitigated to a large extent.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to manage and to utilize it. Everything is very intuitive.
cons: The renew process should be more flexible.

review_title: This has been a solid product for application benchmarking and performance testing.
author: Alan T.
pros: It's very easy to create and modify tests, and flexible in how you can work with variables and spreadsheets for input.
cons: The amount of functionality can be overwhelming, and the interface is somewhat bare-bones until you get used to it.

author: Saravana K.
pros: No coding necessary Create Scripts in minutes by clicking through your application
cons: performance & executing tests and fixing problems. ...
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
